regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: CSRD scoping assessment commissioned from BDO Hamburg; FY2026 likely first reporting year.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Rietberg PE/PA vacuum-skin cold cut packs at risk of Class C; recyclability audit commissioned.

regulations.title: Verpackungsdurchführungsgesetz Amendment
regulations.summary: Article 12c EPR multipliers; PackML declarations; BVE working group engagement initiated.
